title: Nanorrhinum hastatum

intro: Nanorrhinum hastatum, also known as desert trumpet or horned toad flower, is a succulent plant native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, due to its health benefits.
